message:
test(web): add tests for stores, hooks, and API routes (batch 2)

Coverage for history-store (22 tests), featured-store (42 tests),
use-rating hook (8 tests), useLeaderboard hook (8 tests),
leaderboard API route (10 tests), and history API route (18 tests).
